---
cache: true
number-depth: 2
callout-appearance: simple
callout-icon: false
---

# Introduction to Probability {#sec-1}

{{< include ch01/_01-01-history.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-02-interpretations.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-03-experiments.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-04-set-theory.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-05-defn-of-probability.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-06-finite-sample-spaces.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-07-counting-methods.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-08-combinatorial-methods.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-09-multinomial-coefficients.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-10-union-of-events.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-11-statistical-swindles.qmd >}}

{{< include ch01/_01-12-exercises.qmd >}}
